title: Guajillo Beer Braised Short Ribs
description: A rich and flavorful Italian-inspired short ribs recipe utilizing guajillo peppers and beer. Perfect for a hearty winter dinner.
instructions: Season the short ribs with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the short ribs until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the short ribs from the pot and set aside.
Add the guajillo peppers to the pot and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the beer and paleo to the pot, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the short ribs to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Strain the braising liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean saucepan, discarding the solids.
Bring the braising liquid to a simmer over medium heat and cook until reduced by half, about 10 minutes.
Serve the short ribs with the reduced braising liquid spooned over the top.
